top3.sql:
WITH cause_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        c.db_year,
        p.oaf_violation_category AS cause,
        COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM collisions col
    JOIN case_ids c ON col.case_id = c.case_id
    JOIN parties p ON col.case_id = p.case_id
    WHERE p.oaf_violation_category IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY c.db_year, p.oaf_violation_category
),
top_two_per_year AS (
    SELECT 
        db_year,
        cause,
        count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY db_year ORDER BY count DESC) AS rn
    F...

WITH cause_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        c.db_year,
        p.oaf_violation_category AS cause,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM collisions col
    JOIN case_ids c ON col.case_id = c.case_id
    JOIN parties p ON col.case_id = p.case_id
    WHERE p.oaf_violation_category IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY c.db_year, p.oaf_violation_category
),
ranked_causes AS (
    SELECT 
        db_year,
        cause,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY db_year ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rnk
    FROM cause_counts
),
